src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a bean-based SecurityFilterChain configuration.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors if the class is extended.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from protected method override to a bean method returning SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The protected configure(HttpSecurity) method in WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; configuration must be done via a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL to use lambda-based configuration and new method names.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: Old DSL methods like authorizeRequests(), formLogin(), and logout() without lambdas are removed in Spring Security 6; the new API requires lambda arguments for nested configuration.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The new SecurityFilterChain bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain object; the old void method did not require this.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation import to jakarta.validation namespace for Jakarta EE compatibility.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate javax.websocket.server import to jakarta.websocket.server namespace for Jakarta EE compatibility.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: The javax.websocket package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing a compile error 'package javax.websocket.server does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.
